candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets; inferior to the explicit total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.
Explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents; best match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-period cash, not the balance-sheet cash at period end.

candidates.row_label: Net Change in Cash including Foreign Exchange Effects
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.
Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
Appears as a blank/header-like line without values; inferior to the explicit total.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Cash flow working-capital adjustment line, not balance-sheet stock value.
Best balance-sheet proxy for short-term debt/current financial liabilities; separate current lease liabilities are disclosed, so this likely excludes leases and matches baseline STD.
Explicit lease liabilities; baseline STD excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Lease-related maturity line; baseline STD excludes leases.
Operating payable, not debt.
Non-interest-bearing operating/current liabilities, not short-term debt.

variables.notes: Chosen outside STD shortlist because no candidates were provided. Separate 'Current lease liabilities' exists, so 'Current financial liabilities' is the clean non-lease short-term debt line.

candidates.why: Explicit current tax liability line; best match for taxes payable/current tax payable.
Best reported total/net PPE-style line on the balance sheet; preferable to gross or accumulated component lines.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Only the leased PPE component and a balancing/net artifact, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross leased PPE component only, not total/net PPE.
Balancing line, not the clean reported PPE total.
Intangibles, not PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the clean net tangible/PPE line rather than component or balancing rows.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.
Explicit net cash flow from operating activities line; direct match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow before changes to working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because no OANCF candidates were provided; this is the explicit operating cash flow line.
